allow: Bash(node -e " const lines = require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''/dev/stdin'', ''utf8''\); // Check for basic JS syntax issues - unclosed braces etc let open = 0, close = 0; lines.split\(''\\n''\).forEach\(\(l, i\) => { // skip minified lines \(very long\) if \(l.length > 500\) return; for \(const c of l\) { if \(c === ''{''\) open++; if \(c === ''}''\) close++; } }\); console.log\(''{ count:'', open, ''} count:'', close, ''diff:'', open - close\); ")
